name: Skywork-o1-Open-Llama-3.1-8B
archDisplay: Dense transformer (Llama-3.1-8B architecture), fine-tuned with o1-style slow-thinking + process-reward-model data
note: Early open o1-style reasoning model built on Llama-3.1-8B with PRM-guided slow-thinking reasoning traces

verificationNotes: Confirmed real HF repo exists with initial commit dated 2024-11-26 (matches release date). Config.json confirms max_position_embeddings=131072 (128K ctx, via RoPE scaling from base 8192) and 8B Llama-3.1 architecture. License and Kunlun/Skywork attribution confirmed via HF model card and press coverage of Skywork o1 series. No results rows were present to verify (none claimed).
